originalBehavior: The published lesson boots the Learning Synths shell and walks through oscillator changes with a slider-driven synth visualization.
localStatus: The local route keeps that lesson shell and oscillator runtime under the route tree while moving provenance to the shared footer.
notes: The archive stays on the published runtime instead of rebuilding the oscillator examples in a custom synth UI.
Local chapter links are rewritten after mount so the lesson can stay within the shipped synth family.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading and the slider update path on the shipped oscillator scene.
The public route keeps footer-only provenance and strips the upstream lesson shell from the body.

originalBehavior: The published oscillator lesson relies on shared lesson media, including waveform visuals, text payloads, RNBO patch data, and 3D or canvas-backed helper assets.
localStatus: The local route archives those assets under its own tree so the oscillator lesson can run without remote media fetches.
notes: The archived inventory matches the shared Learning Synths bundle used by the other shipped synth lessons.
Model and image assets stay route-local so the oscillator lesson does not fall back to the upstream root path.
evidence: Music smoke coverage asserts the expected local asset counts before interaction checks begin.
The no-remote-playable-media smoke guard stays clean after lesson boot.

originalBehavior: The published oscillator lesson updates the opening slider scene as waveform shape changes and notes are retriggered.
localStatus: The local route keeps the slider-driven waveform scene and note-trigger logic while serving the full lesson from local assets.
notes: The route treats the opening slider scene as parity-critical because it is the clearest oscillator control surface in the lesson.
The lesson remains mounted inside the published chapter shell instead of collapsing into a single custom widget.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies the slider fill changes, the synth macro value updates, and the lesson enters and exits its active note state.
Responsive checks keep the oscillator lesson usable on narrow viewports under the local archive shell.
